fields.name: Digital Art

fields.title: Anime Portrait Commission

fields.name: Adventure
fields.description: Stories focused on exploration, quests, and journeys across vast worlds, often involving danger, friendship, and discovery.

fields.name: Fantasy
fields.description: Fiction that includes magical elements, supernatural beings, and imaginary worlds beyond reality.

fields.name: Romance
fields.description: Stories centered on relationships, emotional connections, and love, often involving personal growth and conflict.

fields.title: One Piece
fields.author: Eiichiro Oda
fields.synopsis: A young pirate named Monkey D. Luffy sets out on a grand journey to find the legendary treasure known as the “One Piece” and become the King of the Pirates. Along the way, he forms a diverse crew and faces powerful enemies while exploring vast seas and mysterious islands.

fields.title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
fields.author: J.K. Rowling
fields.synopsis: Harry Potter returns to Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry for his second year, only to discover that a mysterious force is petrifying students. As secrets about the school’s past resurface, Harry must uncover the truth behind the Chamber of Secrets before it’s too late.

fields.title: She’s Dating the Gangster
fields.author: Bianca Bernardino
fields.synopsis: Athena Dizon agrees to pretend to be the girlfriend of Kenji de los Reyes, a notorious campus heartthrob with a bad-boy reputation. What starts as a fake relationship slowly turns into something deeper, as both confront their pasts, emotions, and the reality of love.

fields.title: Kaguya-sama: Love Is War
fields.author: Aka Akasaka
fields.synopsis: At the prestigious Shuchiin Academy, student council president Miyuki Shirogane and vice president Kaguya Shinomiya are both brilliant and prideful. Despite their mutual feelings, neither wants to confess first, believing it would be a sign of weakness. What follows is a series of hilarious psychological battles as they try to trick each other into admitting love.

fields.title: The Greatest Story of All Time
fields.comment:
One Piece isn’t just a story, it’s a lifelong journey. From the very first episode, it builds a world so rich and alive that you feel like you’re part of the crew. The characters are incredibly well-written, each with their own dreams, struggles, and emotional depth. What makes it truly special is how it balances humor, adventure, and heartbreaking moments seamlessly.

The storytelling is on another level. Plot threads introduced hundreds of chapters ago come back in the most satisfying ways, showing how carefully everything is planned. Themes of friendship, freedom, justice, and chasing your dreams are explored so powerfully that it leaves a lasting impact.

It’s rare for a series this long to maintain its quality, but One Piece just keeps getting better. For me, it’s not just one of the best stories ever told—it is the greatest story of all time.

fields.title: DIY Wooden Phone Stand
fields.description: A simple and elegant wooden phone stand that can hold your device in both portrait and landscape modes.
fields.materials: Scrap wood, wood glue, sandpaper, varnish
fields.steps:
1. Cut wood into base and holder pieces
2. Sand all edges for smooth finish
3. Assemble using wood glue
4. Apply varnish and let dry

fields.title: Obstacle Avoiding Robot (Arduino)
fields.description: A robot that detects obstacles using ultrasonic sensors and automatically changes direction.
fields.materials: Arduino Uno, ultrasonic sensor, motor driver, wheels, battery pack
fields.steps:
1. Connect ultrasonic sensor to Arduino
2. Program distance detection logic
3. Attach motors and driver
4. Test and calibrate movement

fields.title: Handmade Explosion Gift Box
fields.description: A creative gift box that “explodes” into layers when opened, revealing messages and photos.
fields.materials: Colored paper, glue, scissors, printed photos
fields.steps:
1. Cut and fold base structure
2. Create layered panels
3. Attach photos and messages
4. Assemble outer box

fields.comment: Simple but very practical. The steps were easy to follow and the final product looks clean and sturdy.
Super creative and perfect for gifts. Took some time to assemble but the result was definitely worth it.
Really fun project! The explanation of the sensor logic was clear, and it worked perfectly after setup.
I agree with someone on top
